subject: Sneasel, a dark-type weasel-like Pokemon, leaping dynamically on ice with colorful berries and fruits scattered in the air around it
description: A small, sleek dark blue-gray Pokemon with red feather-like ear tufts and a pointed tail leaps across a snowy-icy surface. The figure is in a sharp mid-leap pose, body angled with claws extended. Around it, colorful objects — red berries, green leaves, and assorted small fruits — are scattered as if spilling from a disturbed nest or basket. Partially visible in the lower left is a smaller, rounder white creature that appears to be in the scene as a secondary presence. The background is white and pale blue, suggesting snow and ice. The art style is clean Pokemon TCG illustration with cel-shading.
foreground: Sneasel mid-leap with claws extended; scattered colorful berries and leaves in the air
background: Snow and ice — white and pale blue
emotion: Mischievous energy; caught mid-theft in a gleeful pounce
